description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a rectangular hedge fence, featuring a hip roof with multiple intersecting sections in shades of brown. The structure has a prominent front entrance with a small covered porch, and large windows are visible on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light. The exterior walls are finished in a light neutral color, contrasting with the darker roof. The property includes a driveway or pathway leading to the entrance, and a landscaped area with shrubs or small trees along one side. The rear of the bungalow has additional access points and a small patio or utility area. The overall design is compact, with a focus on symmetry and functional outdoor space.
description: A single-story bungalow with a hip roof, light-colored walls, large windows, and a surrounding hedge fence, featuring a front porch and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, large front windows, and the hedge fence enclosing the property.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the intersecting hip roof sections, back access, and a small patio or utility area.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pathway to the entrance, side windows, and landscaped shrubs along the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible rear patio, side entrance, and additional landscaping within the hedge boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
